title: Backend Engineer
chunk_text: build and operate backend services for internal platforms using python fastapi postgresql docker and cloud infrastructure. improve api reliability data pipelines observability and service performance. work with product and data teams on scalable systems.

title: Data Engineer
chunk_text: design and maintain batch and streaming data pipelines for analytics and machine learning use cases. use python sql airflow dbt spark cloud storage and stronger monitoring. ensure data quality schema consistency lineage visibility and production reliability.

title: Data Warehouse Engineer
chunk_text: develop warehouse models and orchestration workflows using sql python dbt and airflow. improve documentation schema consistency testing coverage and data discoverability across finance datasets.

title: Machine Learning Engineer
chunk_text: develop ml services and retrieval pipelines for enterprise products. build feature pipelines model serving apis embedding workflows vector search services and evaluation tooling. collaborate with backend engineers and data scientists on production systems.

title: Analytics Engineer
chunk_text: own transformation models and metrics layers for hiring and people analytics. build sql models data tests dashboards and documentation. partner with data engineers and business stakeholders to improve trust in curated datasets.

title: Python Backend Developer
chunk_text: support backend development for fintech platform services using python rest apis postgresql ci workflows and docker. write maintainable code improve testing and work on service monitoring and incident reduction.

title: Data Platform Engineer
chunk_text: build platform capabilities for ingestion orchestration metadata tracking and warehouse operations. work with airflow kafka python terraform and cloud-native infrastructure to support multiple domain teams.

title: Software Engineer - Search
chunk_text: develop search and recommendation backend systems with python or jvm services elasticsearch ranking logic experimentation and monitoring. improve relevance latency and retrieval quality for marketplace users.

title: BI Engineer
chunk_text: develop bi pipelines and curated reporting tables for commercial and operations teams. use sql python dashboards and data validation workflows to improve reporting consistency and decision-making.

title: RAG Platform Engineer
chunk_text: build retrieval-augmented generation infrastructure including document chunking embedding pipelines vector indexes reranking evaluation and llm-backed api services. focus on reliability observability and offline evaluation.

title: Data Engineer
chunk_text: maintain ingestion jobs transform raw datasets into curated tables document schemas and support analytics consumers. use python sql docker and workflow automation to improve data freshness and quality.

title: Backend Platform Engineer
chunk_text: design internal platform services for backend teams. build apis service templates postgresql-backed systems observability tooling ci pipelines and incident response workflows. improve developer productivity and production reliability.

title: Data Quality Engineer
chunk_text: own validation checks and data quality workflows across batch pipelines. use sql python airflow and warehouse testing patterns to detect schema drift freshness problems and lineage issues before datasets reach analysts.

title: ML Infrastructure Engineer
chunk_text: build model deployment infrastructure feature pipelines and experiment tracking systems. use python kubernetes docker cloud services and api-based model serving with strong monitoring and rollback practices.

title: Data Engineer
chunk_text: build and maintain elt workflows for product and commercial reporting. use sql dbt python cloud storage and automated data checks. document source-to-model assumptions and improve dataset reliability for stakeholders.

title: Applied NLP Engineer
chunk_text: work on nlp systems using transformers semantic search embeddings reranking and retrieval evaluation. build python services and offline evaluation pipelines to support production language features.

title: MLOps Engineer
chunk_text: support ml platform workflows using sklearn pytorch docker kubernetes experiment tracking and feature delivery patterns. improve offline evaluation deployment reliability and reproducibility for data science teams.

title: Search Relevance Engineer
chunk_text: improve semantic retrieval and ranking quality using embeddings elasticsearch query analysis click metrics and backend experimentation. build apis and evaluation tooling for production search services.
